no_anomaly_coverage.searched_population: All invoices with usage_count >= 2 in the expense database. SQL: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices JOIN expense_records GROUP BY invoice_id HAVING COUNT(record_id) >= 2. Result: 6 invoices (INV000002, INV000005, INV000020, INV000028, INV000037, INV000055) with 12 linked records.
no_anomaly_coverage.conclusion: R004201-R004206 are explicitly labeled as '重复发票注入样本' (duplicate invoice injection test samples) in their reason fields, with record_no prefix 'BX2025X' distinguishing them from genuine records ('BX2025'). R004201 additionally has expense_date (2025-02-10) before invoice_date (2025-08-19), confirming non-genuine data. These injection samples do not represent actual reimbursements and therefore no anomaly exists under Article 10.
